# Pull Request Template

## Changes
- Adds a starter scaffold for the Typing Test app: index.html, styles.css, app.js
- Adds utility modules: src/metrics.js, src/storage.js, src/focus-trap.js
- Adds README and user-stories.md

## How to test
1. Checkout branch `feature/start-test-scaffold`
2. Serve statically (npx serve .) or open index.html
3. Start typing in the textarea to begin the test

## Notes
- This is a starter scaffold meant for iteration.
